title: Vibrant Caramelized Mediterranean Wild Garlic Flatbread
description: A salty and flaky post-workout Mediterranean dish featuring wild garlic leaves, this flatbread is perfect for a snack or light meal. It is made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients and cooked in an agave leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the flatbread dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with sea salt.
Arrange the wild garlic leaves on top of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the lemon juice and agave syrup over the garlic leaves.
Sprinkle the fresh thyme sprig over the top.
Place the flatbread in the agave leaf vessel and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Slice the flatbread into wedges and serve warm.
